Welcome to MediBot

Your Smart AI Health Companion

Ask questions about medications, get wellness guidance, and analyze medical reports instantly using advanced clinical intelligence.

MediBot Core Capabilities

Explore the complete set of intelligent medical tools engineered for modern patient-first wellness.

AI Prescription Scanning

Transform handwritten prescriptions into organized digital records. Automatically extract medicine names, dosages, and treatment instructions using AI-powered OCR technology.

Smart Medication Management

Manage medications from a centralized dashboard. Track schedules, monitor daily intake, configure reminders, and organize treatment plans efficiently.

Medication Reminders & Adherence Tracking

Receive personalized medication alerts, track completed doses, monitor adherence progress, and maintain consistent treatment routines.

Blood Test Analysis & Health Insights

Upload blood test reports and receive AI-generated interpretations, simplified explanations, health trend analysis, and actionable insights.

AI-Powered Health Assistant

Get instant guidance about prescriptions, medications, blood reports, and general wellness through MediBot, your intelligent healthcare companion.

Nutrition & Wellness Recommendations

Receive personalized dietary recommendations, nutrition guidance, and health-focused suggestions based on medical insights.

Prescription Safety & Validation

Improve medication safety through intelligent prescription analysis, medication validation, duplicate detection, and automated safety checks.

BMI & Health Monitoring

Track BMI, monitor wellness indicators, and visualize health progress through intuitive health metrics and dashboards.

Medical Records Management

Store and manage prescriptions, blood reports, and medical documents securely with quick access to historical records.

Emergency Contact & Health Alerts

Maintain emergency contacts and enable critical health alert mechanisms for additional safety and support.

Smart Notifications

Stay informed through medication reminders, health updates, and important healthcare notifications.

Health Analytics & Progress Tracking

Monitor medication adherence, treatment progress, and long-term health trends through visual analytics.

Personalized Dashboard

Access medications, reminders, health records, reports, and healthcare tools from a centralized dashboard experience.

Why Choose MediBot

We build with clinical safety and patient empowerment at our core.

AI-Powered Healthcare Assistance

Instant conversational feedback regarding common prescriptions, lab values, and wellness guidelines from a clinical language assistant.

Simplified Medical Report Understanding

No medical jargon. Convert blood test numbers and abbreviations into simple, plain-language insights you can discuss with doctors.

Better Medication Adherence

Track streaks, configure notifications, and receive missed dose alerts to keep your treatment cycles consistent.

Personalized Health Recommendations

Get customized wellness guidelines, dietary alerts, and exercise advice based on your diagnostic and physical metrics.

Secure Health Record Management

Store medical documents in an encrypted vault. Enjoy complete data sovereignty with isolated local sandboxes.

Modern User-Friendly Experience

Enjoy a smooth, highly readable layout with single-click actions, light/dark themes, and quick-prompt templates.

Information We Take

Review the specific categories of data processed securely within our clinical ecosystem.

Personal Information

  • Full Name
  • Email Address
  • Password (or Google Sign-In Authentication)
  • Age

Emergency Contact Information

  • Emergency Contact Name
  • Emergency Contact Number
  • Emergency Contact Email Address

Medical Information

  • Prescription Records
  • Blood Test Reports
  • Medication Schedules
  • Medication History
  • Uploaded Medical Documents
  • Health Tracking Information

Account Information

  • Profile Image (Optional)
  • Login Activity
  • Device Information

"Your information is collected solely to provide medication management, medical document analysis, health tracking, and emergency support features within Medi-Scan."

Secure Sandbox

Your Medical Privacy & Data Safety

We prioritize data sovereignty. Learn how we handle document analysis, retention periods, and your healthcare privacy rights.

Last updated: April 2025

1. Introduction

Mediscann ("we", "our", or "us") is committed to protecting your personal health information. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you use our mobile application. By using Mediscann, you agree to the collection and use of information as described in this policy.

2. Information We Collect

We collect the following types of information:

  • Personal identifiers: name, email address, age
  • Health information: prescription images, blood test reports, BMI data, medication schedules
  • Usage data: scan history, app activity, device identifiers
  • Profile image (optional)
  • Emergency contact details (optional)

3. How We Use Your Information

We use the information we collect to:

  • Analyze and interpret your medical documents using AI
  • Send medication reminders and health alerts
  • Maintain your personal health records
  • Improve our services and develop new features

4. Health Data and HIPAA

Mediscann handles sensitive health information. We implement industry-standard security measures including encryption in transit (TLS) and at rest. Health data is stored on AWS infrastructure with access controls. We do not sell your health data to third parties. AI analysis of your medical documents is performed to provide the service you request and is not used for advertising.

5. Data Storage and Retention

Your data is stored on secure AWS servers located in the United States. We retain your personal data for as long as your account is active or as needed to provide services. You may request deletion of your data at any time through the "Delete Account" option in your profile settings. Upon deletion, we will remove your data from active systems within 30 days, subject to legal retention requirements.

6. Data Sharing

We do not sell, trade, or rent your personal information. We may share data with:

  • AWS (cloud infrastructure provider)
  • Google Gemini / OpenRouter (AI analysis — document content only, not personal identifiers)
  • Law enforcement if required by law

7. Your Rights

You have the right to:

  • Access the personal data we hold about you
  • Correct inaccurate personal data
  • Request deletion of your personal data (Right to Erasure)
  • Withdraw consent at any time
  • Lodge a complaint with your local data protection authority

8. Third-Party Services

Mediscann integrates with third-party services including AWS Cognito for authentication and Google Sign-In for social login. These services have their own privacy policies which we encourage you to review.

9. Children's Privacy

Mediscann is not intended for use by children under the age of 13. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13. If you believe a child under 13 has provided us with personal information, please contact us immediately.

10. Changes to This Policy

We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. If we make significant changes, we will notify users through appropriate channels. The updated policy will be effective from the date shown at the top of this document.

Empowering Health Literacy

A Smarter Health Companion

MediBot bridges the gap between complex clinical data and patients. We use advanced language models to offer secure, conversational clarity on health queries.

MediBot is an AI-powered healthcare companion designed to help users understand medical documents, manage medications, monitor health progress, and access intelligent health insights through advanced AI technologies.

Mission

Healthcare terminology can feel like a foreign language. Our mission is to democratize health literacy by breaking down prescriptions, medication functions, and clinical measurements into clear, friendly, and structured layperson explanations. We aim to support patients in feeling informed, prepared, and active in their wellness journey.

Vision

We envision a future where patient care is backed by transparent, understandable, and instant digital assistants. By collaborating with clinicians and focusing strictly on medical document privacy, MediBot aims to become an industry standard for secure patient-facing health AI, fostering stronger relationships between patients and physicians.

What We Offer

Empowering your health journey with advanced, privacy-first digital tools.

AI Prescription Scanning

Digitize printed or handwritten scripts automatically using precision OCR engines.

Blood Test Analysis

Translate complex lab biomarkers and values into clear layperson descriptions.

Medication Tracking

Log your therapeutic history, schedule reminders, and track overall adherence.

Health Monitoring

Log and track BMI, weight values, and vital physiological markers over time.

Personalized Wellness Insights

Receive nutritional, dietary, and basic wellness logs adapted to your health metrics.

AI Health Assistance

Discuss prescriptions, medical terminology, and report details instantly with MediBot.

Our Commitment

We are committed to making healthcare information easier to understand while helping users stay organized, informed, and proactive about their health.

What Information We Store

We transparently disclose the records cached to facilitate your digital healthcare tracking.

Personal Information

  • Full Name
  • Email Address
  • Age

Emergency Contact

  • Contact Name
  • Contact Number
  • Contact Email

Medical Records

  • Prescription History
  • Blood Test Reports
  • Medication Schedules
  • Health Tracking Data

Why We Collect This Information

  • To analyze prescriptions and medical reports using AI
  • To provide medication reminders
  • To maintain medical history records
  • To provide emergency health support
  • To generate personalized health insights

How Medi-Scan Works

Discover our streamlined, AI-assisted path to health literacy and medication compliance.

Step 01

Upload prescriptions or blood reports

Securely scan printed prescriptions, handwritten logs, or blood report sheets using our smart clinical OCR scanner.

Step 02

AI extracts and analyzes medical information

Our integrated AI parses medication dosages, timing codes, safety thresholds, and physiological markers into plain language summaries.

Step 03

Users receive medication reminders

MediBot schedules local notifications, smart compliance streak indicators, and missed-dose contacts alert structures.

Step 04

MediBot provides health guidance

Ask follow-up questions, request dietary tips, clarify pharmacy abbreviations, and receive context-aware guidance.

Step 05

Medical records are securely maintained for future reference

All digitized health records, logs, and report archives remain safely stored in your local clinical vault.

MediBot Headquarters

Have questions about our technology or privacy protocols? Get in touch with our team directly.
